details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements: (1) INIObject.zig created with proper create, parse, and stringify functions returning JSValue; (2) Parse handles sections as nested objects, key=value pairs, and both ; and # comments; (3) Properly wired in BunObject.zig with lazy property callback and getINIObject function; (4) C++ exports header updated with INI macro; (5) C++ hash table entry added for lazy property; (6) TypeScript definitions include namespace INI with documented parse/stringify signatures; (7) Parser is self-contained with no npm INI imports; (8) Code follows Zig conventions (jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, @import patterns). Tests are comprehensive. Minor deduction only for unnecessary empty PLAN.md file in diff.
